questions.question: Which institution manages the Overdraft facility availed by the State Government?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India has announced certain relaxations in the terms of the Over Draft Facility availed by the State Governments. The maximum number of days of OD in a quarter is being increased from 36 to 50 days and the number of consecutive days of OD from 14 to 21 days. This facility will be available up to September 30, 2021.

questions.question: What is the World Health Organisation (WHO) slogan for this year’s World Hand Hygiene Day?

options.label: A
options.text: Seconds save lives – clean your hands

answer.label: A
answer.text: Seconds save lives – clean your hands

questions.explanation: Hand Hygiene Day is observed across the world on 5 May every year, to create awareness on hand hygiene and make handwashing facilities accessible to all. 2 out of every 5 people on the Earth lack access to basic handwashing facilities, as per WHO. This year the WHO slogan is: Seconds save lives – clean your hands! WHO has also declared 2021 the “Year of the Health and Care Worker”.

questions.question: Which country has proposed mass culling of elephants, to reduce the population?
questions.explanation: The Government of Zimbabwe, has proposed for mass killing of elephants, which is known as culling. This is aimed to reduce the population of elephants in the country, which has crossed more than a lakh. The country is of the opinion that the large number of elephants is leading to destruction of other species habitat and is leading to increased human – animal conflict.

questions.question: Which state Government has launched Ayurvedic telemedicine facility for Covid patients?
questions.explanation: Haryana Government has launched Ayurvedic telemedicine facility for Covid patients. As per the Health Ministry of the state, patients can consult Ayurvedic Doctors on phone by dialling 1075. A Call centre has been set up to run the helpline and teams of senior Ayurvedic Doctors have been appointed for consultation. The tele consultation facility would be helpful for patients in isolation.

questions.question: Lumpy skin disease (LSD), which causes prolonged morbidity in cattle and buffaloes, is a ………… disease.
questions.explanation: Lumpy skin disease (LSD) is a viral disease that causes prolonged morbidity in cattle and buffaloes. Recently, the Bihar government issued an advisory about the likely spread of lumpy skin disease (LSD) in the state. The state’s animal and fishery department has alerted all districts about the likely spread of LSD. The department has also issued a helpline number for cattle owners for obtaining information and help. In August 2019, the first outbreak of LSD was reported from Odisha.

questions.question: “ID-Art app” has been launched by which organisation?
questions.explanation: Interpol has launched a mobile app named “ID-Art app”. This app would help identify stolen cultural property, reduce illicit trafficking, and increase the chances of recovering stolen works and artefacts. This has been designed to be used by law enforcement agencies across the globe to get access to the Interpol’s database of stolen works of art. It can also be accessed by the general public.

questions.question: What is the theme of ‘National Technology Day’ 2021?

options.label: A
options.text: Science and Technology for a Sustainable Future

options.label: D
options.text: Science and Technology for Atmanirbhar India

answer.label: A
answer.text: Science and Technology for a Sustainable Future

questions.explanation: National Technology Day is celebrated on May 11 every year to commemorate the technological advancements made by the country. The theme this year is “Science and Technology for a Sustainable Future”. The day was first observed on May 11, 1999, as on the same date in 1998, India successfully conducted three nuclear tests at Indian Army’s Pokhran Test Range in Rajasthan. On 11th May 1998, India also tested its first indigenous aircraft Hansa-3 and surface-to-air missile Trishul.

questions.question: Which bank launched ‘Eva’ chatbot on CSCs Digital Seva Portal to support the Village Level Entrepreneurs (VLEs)?
questions.explanation: HDFC Bank and Common Services Centres (CSCs) launched a chatbot ‘Eva’ on CSCs Digital Seva Portal to support the Village Level Entrepreneurs (VLEs). The chatbot will provide banking services in rural areas. It is a 24×7 service that will allow VLEs to access information about various products, processes and solve the queries about HDFC Bank’s services.

questions.question: Which Racing Driver won the Spanish Grand Prix 2021 Tournament?
questions.explanation: British racing driver Lewis Hamilton of Mercedes defeated Red Bull’s Max Verstappen in the Spanish Grand Prix 2021 tournament. This is Lewis Hamilton’s third win in four races this season, the 98th of his career, after he set his 100th pole position. Max Verstappen finishes second with Valtteri Bottas in third place.

questions.question: Which institution has set up a 12-member National Task Force (NTF) to enhance public health response to the pandemic?
questions.explanation: The Supreme Court of India, has constituted a 12-member National Task Force (NTF), to facilitate a public health response to the pandemic based on scientific and specialised domain knowledge. The task force would include top experts and doctors from across the country. The Union Minister for Health and Family welfare is an ex officio member of the then NTF.
